root_cause: Pipeline activity timed out waiting for Fabric capacity.
resolution: Auto-rerun. If recurring, increase activity timeout or scale up capacity.

root_cause: API rate limit hit from too many concurrent requests.
AAD token expired or invalid service principal credentials.
resolution: Refresh token and rerun. Check if SP certificate/secret expired.
Auto-rerun after brief wait. Alert if persists > 3 attempts.

root_cause: Transient network/gateway failure reaching the source endpoint (502/504 or dropped connection).
resolution: Auto-rerun. Network blips are self-healing; escalate only if it persists > 3 attempts.

root_cause: Source schema changed breaking downstream pipeline expectations.
resolution: Manual fix required. Update pipeline schema mapping.

root_cause: Expected source file or table does not exist.
resolution: Manual fix required. Verify source path and upstream pipeline status.

root_cause: Service principal lacks required permissions on source/destination.
resolution: Manual fix required. Grant required RBAC/ADLS permissions to SP.

root_cause: Source data violates target table constraints.
resolution: Manual fix required. Investigate source data quality and apply cleansing.
